zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Wake於1319年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾布利斯沃斯時，他的父親Thomas Wake40歲，母親Elizabeth Cransley24歲。他於1354年6月14日與Alice Pateshull結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1383年8月14日在英國諾薩普頓史爾享年64歲，埋葬在英國諾薩普頓史爾布利斯沃斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Wake于1319年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾布利斯沃斯时，他的父亲Thomas Wake40岁，母亲Elizabeth Cransley24岁。他于1354年6月14日与Alice Pateshull结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1383年8月14日在英国諾薩普頓史爾享年64岁，埋葬在英国諾薩普頓史爾布利斯沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: Wake
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: occupational name for ‘(man of) the watch’, from Middle English wak, wake ‘wake, vigil, watch, period of guard duty’ (Old English wacu, Old Norse vaka). It alternates with the synonymous Middle English wache (Old English wacce), hence the variant Watch. The surname was also interchangeable with Waite (the equivalent Old French term) which, like Wake, was sometimes translated as Latin vigil ‘(one who is) watchful, alert’. Compare the synonymous Vail . When the bearers had high social status, the surname probably denoted an officer with responsibility for the security of a castle, town, or royal person. Compare Wakeman .

variants.name: Vail
meanings: English: occupational name from Old French de la veille ‘of the watch, watchman’, with loss of de; compare Wake . There has been some confusion with the topographic name Vale and the nickname Veal .
Scottish: shortened and altered form of McPhail , Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Phàil ‘son of Paul’.

variants.name: Waite
meanings: English (of Norman origin): occupational name for a watchman, either in a town or castle, from Anglo-Norman French waite ‘watchman, member of the watch’ (of ancient Germanic origin; compare Wachter ). In the Middle Ages the town waits typically combined the functions of watchmen and musicians through being trumpeters or pipers. There may also have been some late confusion with White or Wheat .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Wake was born in 1319, in Blisworth, Northamptonshire, England, his father, Thomas Wake, was 40 and his mother, Elizabeth Cransley, was 24. He married Alice Pateshull on 14 June 1354. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 14 August 1383, in Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 64, and was buried in Blisworth, Northamptonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Wake est né en 1319, à Blisworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Wake, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Cransley, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Alice Pateshull le 14 juin 1354. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 14 août 1383, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Blisworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Wake 1319 in Blisworth, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Wake 40 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Cransley 24. Er hat am 14. Juni 1354 Alice Pateshull geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 14. August 1383 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Northamptonshire, England und wurde in Blisworth, Northamptonshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Wake è nato il nel 1319 nel Blisworth, Northamptonshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Wake, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Cransley, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Alice Pateshull il 14 giugno 1354. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 14 agosto 1383, nel Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Blisworth, Northamptonshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Wakeが1319年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブリスウオルスで生まれた時，父Thomas Wakeは40歳，母Elizabeth Cransleyは24歳であった。1354年6月14日にAlice Pateshullと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1383年8月14日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアで64歳で死去し，イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブリスウオルスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Wake(이)가 1319년 영국 노르섬프토실르 블리스워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Wake(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Cransley(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1354년 6월 14일 Alice Pateshull(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1383년 8월 14일 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르섬프토실르 블리스워스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Wake nasceu em 1319, em Blisworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Wake, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Cransley, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Pateshull em 14 de junho de 1354. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 14 de agosto de 1383, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Blisworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Wake родился в 1319 г. в местности блисворт, нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Wake было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Cransley, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Pateshull 14 июня 1354 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 14 августа 1383 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности блисворт, нортамптоншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Wake nació en 1319, en Blisworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Wake, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Cransley, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Alice Pateshull el 14 de junio de 1354. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 14 de agosto de 1383, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Blisworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.
